title: calandrinia arenaria var. subverticillata
intro: Calandrinia arenaria var. subverticillata, also known as Rock Purslane, is a succulent plant species that belongs to the Portulacaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Rock Purslane include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing relief from digestive issues due to its high water content and nutrient-rich properties. Herbal preparations of Rock Purslane often involve infusions, teas, or topical applications, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and digestive problems.
